name: Tussle
description: A Toribash-style verified joint-combat match: two FIGURES (each a dregg cell) pose their N JOINTS (typed `sym` enum slots) through a commit→reveal→resolve frame machine. The joint-state-is-one-of-the-enum tooth is the typed sym atom SymMemberOf — deos's hyperadvanced enum atom, which BITES as a REAL executor refusal in the deos fire path (an illegal joint value is rejected by the executor, not by app bookkeeping).

phase_machine.order: COMMIT < REVEAL < RESOLVED (Monotonic(PHASE_SLOT) — the frame never runs backward)

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed TWO-cell DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.two_cell_note: figure A = cipherclerk.cell_id() (the agent's own); figure B = a distinct COMPANION cell (figure_b_cell_id = derive_raw(pubkey, FIGURE_B_TOKEN)), birthed via EmbeddedExecutor::ensure_cell + granted a reaching cap (the privacy-voting companion-cell pattern). BOTH are seeded so the gated fires have live state.
deos.publish: Signature (each figure cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a spectator on another federation watches across the membrane)
deos.rights_ladder: Signature ⊂ Either ⊂ None = spectator ⊂ fighter ⊂ referee

affordances.view_figure: cap-only, Signature (a SPECTATOR watches a figure's pose)
affordances.commit_move: GATED (cap∧state), Either — PHASE==COMMIT precondition; the fire submits the FULL commit (the sealed BLAKE3 fog-of-war digest into COMMIT_SEAL_SLOT)
affordances.reveal_move: GATED (cap∧state), Either — PHASE==REVEAL precondition; the fire writes the revealed joint `sym` values, the executor RE-ENFORCING SymMemberOf (an ILLEGAL joint value is REFUSED — the headline)
affordances.resolve_frame: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — PHASE==REVEAL precondition; the REFEREE advances PHASE→RESOLVED (folding contact via resolve_contact off both figures), the executor RE-ENFORCING Monotonic(PHASE)

deos.headline: THE TYPED `sym` ENUM ATOM (SymMemberOf) BITES AS A REAL EXECUTOR REFUSAL IN THE DEOS FIRE PATH — a reveal_move writing a joint value outside {Relax,Contract,Hold,Extend} is rejected by the EXECUTOR (msg 'sym … not in enum set'), not by app bookkeeping.
deos.cap_tooth: set joints only on YOUR figure — a fighter firing commit_move on a figure cell it does NOT hold a cap to is REFUSED (the wrong-figure tooth: an executor authorization refusal on the foreign Sovereign cell).
deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded figure cells carrying the figure program (per-joint SymMemberOf + Monotonic(PHASE)), so an ILLEGAL joint reveal and a PHASE rewind BITE in the deos fire path (tests/deos_seam.rs)

preserved.note: src/resolution.rs (the deterministic contact resolution + the verified-ledger score ring) and src/tests.rs (the library teeth: fog-of-war, cap-gating, reproducibility, the SymMemberOf in-band gate, the verified joint turn) are PRESERVED unchanged — the deos surface is an additive composition skin.
preserved.verified_joint_turn: the contact score deltas fold as a ring of legs through dregg-intent::verified_settle::settle_ring_verified (the Rust mirror of the Lean Ring.settleRing — atomic + conserving + linked to the real Lean export leg-by-leg).
